  "findings": [
    "Wheel alignment was completed without performing the required ADAS recalibration.",
    "Proceeding with assembly or quality gate sign-off without ADAS calibration violates OEM safety mandates."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the vehicle progress at the current quality gate.",
    "Perform the required static and dynamic ADAS recalibrations per OEM specifications.",
    "Verify calibration success with diagnostic scan tool reports before releasing the vehicle."
  ],
  "rationale": "OEM position statements universally mandate that any steering or suspension alignment requires a corresponding recalibration of ADAS sensors (such as front-facing cameras and radar) because sensor aiming is directly dependent on the vehicle's thrust line and steering angle sensor zero-point.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Position Statements on ADAS Recalibration post-Alignment",
    "I-CAR Calibration Requirements"
  ]
}
